title: Tizzle Twirl Tick
poem_text:
Tizzle twirl the glimpy glock,
Bop the bizzle, flick the clock.
Whipple woo the zingy zang,
Dibble dap the jitter jang.
Snick the snazzle, pop the plink,
Flibber flatch the wibbly wink.
Glim the glozzle, tick the tock—
Who’s still zizzling in the sock?
cover_context: A swirling galaxy of glowing, wobbly shapes spinning around a child tucked in bed, toes wiggling under the covers.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, ukulele and soft bongos, 108 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
